chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5622 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.23981/2022 2. For hearing of main case 27.02.2025 Saiyed Younus Saeed, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Mohabat Hussain Awan, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Sardar Zafar Hussain advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent which is taken on record. Statement filed on behalf of respondents No.2, 3 & 5, taken on record. In view of the foregoing learned counsel for the petitioner states that petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
